file.content:
import type { Program } from '../types';

export const program: Program = {
  meta: {
    startDate: '2026-02-09',
    version: '1.1.0',
    principles: [
      'injury_prevention',
      'mobility_every_phase',
      'form_over_load',
      'longevity_focus',
    ],
    constraints: {
      mobility_required: true,
      min_mobility_days_per_week: 1,
    },
  },
  phases: [
    {
      id: 'p1',
      name: 'Phase 1: Structural Integrity',
      duration_weeks: 12,
      description:
        'Building the chassis. Focus on tendon strength and back safety. Deload on week 4 and week 8: reduce sets by 1 and weight by 20%.',
      schedule_pattern: ['A', 'B', 'A', 'B', 'C', 'Rest', 'Rest'],
      workouts: {
        A: {
          name: 'Posterior Chain & Pull',
          focus: 'Back Health & Biceps',
          exercises: [
            {
              name: 'Warmup: Band Pull-Aparts',
              sets: 2,
              reps: '15',
              rest: '0s',
              video_id: 'MnDpmNYUjbc',
              note: 'Light band. Squeeze shoulder blades together at end range.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Warmup: Hip Circles',
              sets: 2,
              reps: '10/direction',
              rest: '0s',
              video_id: 'altA7815AGs',
              video_start: 9,
              note: 'Controlled circles, both directions. Open up the hip capsule.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Swedish Ladder Dead Hang',
              sets: 3,
              reps: '45s',
              rest: '60s',
              video_id: 'iayQ-AeOpvE',
              video_start: 7,
              note: 'Engage scaps, do not just hang loose.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'KB Gorilla Rows',
              sets: 3,
              reps: '12/side',
              rest: '90s',
              video_id: 'Z44y6AgV-TI',
              note: 'Keep lower back flat. Use the 10lb DB if KB is too heavy initially.',
              uses_weight: true,
              starting_weight: 20,
              weight_increment: 5,
            },
            {
              name: 'Kettlebell Swings',
              sets: 4,
              reps: '15',
              rest: '90s',
              video_id: '1cVT3ee9mgU',
              video_start: 9,
              note: 'Hinge only. Squeeze glutes at top. No lower back rounding.',
              uses_weight: true,
              starting_weight: 25,
              weight_increment: 5,
            },
            {
              name: 'TRX Inverted Rows',
              sets: 3,
              reps: '8-12',
              rest: '90s',
              video_id: 'ypIQZWKMbkU',
              video_start: 13,
              note: 'Adjust strap length to change difficulty. Stop 1-2 reps before form breaks down.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
          ],
        },
        B: {
          name: 'Anterior & Core',
          focus: 'Chest, Quads, Abs',
          exercises: [
            {
              name: "Warmup: World's Greatest Stretch",
              sets: 2,
              reps: '5/side',
              rest: '0s',
              video_id: 'u3M3F8ScJsE',
              note: 'Lunge, rotate, reach. Opens hips, T-spine, and shoulders in one flow.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Goblet Squats',
              sets: 3,
              reps: '12',
              rest: '90s',
              video_id: 'tToWat96Rhk',
              note: 'Elbows inside knees at bottom.',
              uses_weight: true,
              starting_weight: 20,
              weight_increment: 5,
            },
            {
              name: 'Swedish Ladder Pushups',
              sets: 3,
              reps: '12-15',
              rest: '60s',
              video_id: 'GcSyCL4qpNI',
              note: 'Slow eccentric (3 seconds down).',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Hanging Knee Raises',
              sets: 3,
              reps: '10',
              rest: '60s',
              video_id: 'l7OroezzX9k',
              note: "Back against the ladder. Don't swing.",
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Peloton HIIT Tabata',
              sets: 1,
              reps: '20 mins',
              rest: 'N/A',
              video_id: '',
              note: "Select a 'Tabata' or 'HIIT' class from the library.",
              uses_weight: false,
            },
          ],
        },
        C: {
          name: 'Mobility & Durability',
          focus: 'Active Recovery',
          exercises: [
            {
              name: '90/90 Hip Switch',
              sets: 2,
              reps: '60s',
              rest: '30s',
              video_id: 'bJII__gcUHA',
              note: 'Loosen up the hips for squats.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Cat/Cow Spinal Flow',
              sets: 2,
              reps: '60s',
              rest: '30s',
              video_id: 'Xq3nUS-Y2q4',
              note: 'Focus on segmental movement.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Thread the Needle',
              sets: 2,
              reps: '8/side',
              rest: '30s',
              video_id: 'ljEdoRyuPpg',
              note: 'Thoracic rotation. Reach through, then open to ceiling. Keep hips stacked.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Wall Slides',
              sets: 2,
              reps: '10',
              rest: '30s',
              video_id: 'gYVohh1dHHQ',
              note: 'Keep lower back and wrists flat against wall. Targets shoulder mobility and scapular control.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
            {
              name: 'Peloton Power Zone Endurance',
              sets: 1,
              reps: '45 mins',
              rest: 'N/A',
              video_id: '',
              note: 'Zone 2/3 focus. Sweat but able to talk.',
              uses_weight: false,
            },
          ],
        },
      },
    },
    {
      id: 'p2',
      name: 'Phase 2: Hypertrophy (Placeholder)',
      duration_weeks: 16,
      description: 'Requires Adjustable DBs & Bench. Data to be generated via prompts.',
      workouts: {},
    },
  ],
};

1	name: Test
2	
3	on:
4	  pull_request:
5	    branches: [main]
6	  push:
7	    branches: [main]
8	
9	jobs:
10	  nix-lint:
11	    name: Nix Lint
12	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
13	    permissions:
14	      contents: read
15	    steps:
16	      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
17	        with:
18	          persist-credentials: false
19	
20	      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
21	        with:
22	          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable
23	
24	      - name: Check formatting
25	        run: nix run nixpkgs#nixfmt -- --check .
26	
27	  zizmor:
28	    name: Zizmor
29	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
30	    permissions:
31	      contents: read
32	    steps:
33	      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
34	        with:
35	          persist-credentials: false
36	
37	      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
38	        with:
39	          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable
40	
41	      - name: Run zizmor
42	        run: |
43	          rc=0
44	          nix run nixpkgs#zizmor -- . --no-online-audits || rc=$?
45	          # Exit 13 = warnings only (acceptable), exit 14+ = errors
46	          if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$rc" -ne 13 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi
47	
48	  build:
49	    name: Build
50	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
51	    permissions:
52	      contents: read
53	    steps:
54	      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
55	        with:
56	          persist-credentials: false
57	
58	      - name: Install Nix
59	        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main
60	
61	      - name: Setup Nix cache
62	        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main
63	
64	      - name: Build production bundle
65	        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run build"
66	
67	  program-principles:
68	    name: Program Principles
69	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
70	    permissions:
71	      contents: read
72	    steps:
73	      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
74	        with:
75	          persist-credentials: false
76	
77	      - name: Install Nix
78	        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main
79	
80	      - name: Setup Nix cache
81	        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main
82	
83	      - name: Validate program data and principles
84	        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run validate-program"
85	
86	  e2e:
87	    name: E2E Tests
88	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
89	    permissions:
90	      contents: read
91	    steps:
92	      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
93	        with:
94	          persist-credentials: false
95	
96	      - name: Install Nix
97	        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main
98	
99	      - name: Setup Nix cache
100	        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main
101	
102	      - name: Run Playwright tests
103	        run: nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test --project=chromium
104	
105	      - name: Upload test artifacts
106	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4
107	        if: failure()
108	        with:
109	          name: playwright-report
110	          path: |
111	            playwright-report/
112	            test-results/
113	          retention-days: 7

file.content:
name: Test

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  nix-lint:
    name: Nix Lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Check formatting
        run: nix run nixpkgs#nixfmt -- --check .

  zizmor:
    name: Zizmor
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Run zizmor
        run: |
          rc=0
          nix run nixpkgs#zizmor -- . --no-online-audits || rc=$?
          # Exit 13 = warnings only (acceptable), exit 14+ = errors
          if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$rc" -ne 13 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Build production bundle
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run build"

  program-principles:
    name: Program Principles
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Validate program data and principles
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run validate-program"

  e2e:
    name: E2E Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Run Playwright tests
        run: nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test --project=chromium

      - name: Upload test artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4
        if: failure()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: |
            playwright-report/
            test-results/
          retention-days: 7

Author: Patrick Flynn <big.pat@gmail.com>

    review: address PR #66 feedback
    
    - Workouts onLog: pull side effects out of the setLog state-updater so
      the reducer stays pure; collapse the redundant meaningless guard
    - progression: build a latest-weighted-entry map once per log change so
      the Workouts render is O(M) instead of O(M*N) as the log grows
    - idb: add dbPutMany for single-transaction bulk writes; use it in the
      import path so legacy backup restores no longer open a transaction
      per entry
    - Timer: drop the local clearInterval helper that shadowed the global
